heading: This Afternoon
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm. Highs in the low to mid 80s north, mid 80s to lower 90s in the south. South to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of a shower or thunderstorm in the south, slight chance north. Lows in the mid to upper 60s, some lower 60s northeast and in the Adirondacks. South to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday
text: Mostly cloudy. Chance of a shower or storm in the south; chance of mainly morning showers north. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s north, and mid 70s to lower 80s in the south. Southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, and becoming west.
